arc: R4u reflight: identical repair set as R4t, flown on the REFRESHED prebuilt crx (lwpolyline setElevation actually deployed)
registered_at_local: 2026-07-10T16:1x (file mtime is the binding evidence; committed BEFORE launch)

r4t_adjudication.cause_measured: stale-deploy trap: patch_engine resolves native modules from prebuilt/<newest>/ BEFORE src/bin; the rebuild refreshed src/bin only, so the flight arxloaded the 07-09 crx without the lwpolyline setElevation repair. Evidence: 25/25 lwpolyline jobs carried the elevation key (values match census exactly: 0.401062 x23, -80 x1, 10 x1) while post vertex z stayed 0.0; batch .scr arxload lines point at prebuilt/2027; prebuilt crx mtime 2026-07-09 18:07 vs fresh build 15:19.
r4t_adjudication.what_worked: H3 vintage restoration +154 and orphan-def sweep +28 landed exactly (26,916 + 182 = 27,098); per-def no-regression guard 0 regressions; block_topology_gate blocked ONLY because its expectation still encoded the pre-sweep reachable-only contract (fixed this commit).

prediction.ceiling_note: 27,123 = 27,130 minus the 7 loops real-geometry pairs (unrepaired, next arc).

decomposition.evidence: probe runs/lw_elevation_probe_20260710: z=0.4010621945564553 round-trips exactly through the refreshed prebuilt crx; R4t jobs already proved the Python side emits 25/25 correct values

prediction.band_rationale: single deterministic mechanism remains, probe-verified end-to-end; floor 27,118 absorbs small flight-to-flight noise only. H3/sweep families re-fly too and are protected by the per-def no-regression guard vs the R4t baseline.

gate_contract_change: block_topology_gate now compares the FULL non-*D census topology (sweep is law); pre-R4t it compared the modelspace-reachable subgraph and misread the 4 restored orphan defs as defs_extra. Tests updated: restored-orphans ok / unrestored-orphans blocked / hallucinated-extra blocked.
structural_fix: tools/build_native_acad.ps1 now auto-deploys dbx+crx into prebuilt/<newest>/ after every canonical build (non-isolated, non-suffixed), reporting prebuilt_deployed in its JSON -- the stale-deploy trap class is closed, not just this instance.

population_pin.required: census must reproduce 294 defs / 27,130 entities; identity sha must equal the pin (LEX-0006); per-def diff0 >= R4t for every def
